patch.value: Alias shim layer: config-aware hidden aliases with one-line migration hints (foundation for all consolidations)

Build the shared mechanism every consolidation cluster uses: a declarative alias table mapping old spellings (e.g. list-open, start-task, history-repair) to new noun-verb invocations, hidden from help, emitting a single config-suppressible migration hint on stderr, with a spelling-parity spec asserting every aliased invocation produces byte-identical output to its canonical form. Duplicate check: no existing alias-shim or deprecation-layer item.

Declarative alias table drives Commander registration; aliases hidden from default help but resolvable; migration hint printed once per invocation to stderr, suppressible via config key; spelling-parity spec proves alias output identical to canonical; contracts/completions expose canonical forms and mark aliases deprecated

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Scope extension (pm-mpbb ledger lever b, promoted 2026-07-11 when the a22j baseline gate opened): in addition to the once-per-invocation stderr hint in the AC, the mutation/query ENVELOPE must carry the canonical spelling machine-readably when an alias was used (e.g. deprecated_alias + canonical fields), so agents self-migrate programmatically instead of parsing stderr. pm-0mox usage counters are the read side of the same channel. Field naming/placement belongs to the pm-srns uniform envelope spec - coordinate, do not invent a one-off shape here.
